name: @block-agent/protocol
description: SessionProtocol v0 — the transport-neutral message catalog (envelope + inbound/outbound discriminated unions). Pure TYPES, zero runtime dependencies. Imported type-only by @block-agent/server (host) and web/ (browser client) so both share one source. Design: ai_com/design/session-protocol-v0.md (D2).
$exports_note: exports point at .ts SOURCE (no build), like the apps. Importers use '@block-agent/protocol/*.js'. Type-only: a consumer imports with `import type`.
